title: Gemini-Eraser - Browser-Based Cleanup Tool
header.title: Gemini-Eraser
main.title: Clean Gemini Images In Your Browser
main.subtitle: Open-source, browser-based watermark cleanup with fast local processing and no upload step.
upload.text: Click to choose, drag in, or paste an image
upload.bulk_hint: Batch import is supported. You can also paste from the clipboard with Ctrl+V.
panel.title: Controls
queue.partial: Added {{added}} files. Skipped {{duplicates}} duplicates and {{unsupported}} unsupported files.
queue.no_new_files: No new supported files were added. Duplicates: {{duplicates}}, unsupported: {{unsupported}}.
feature.title: Why People Use It
feature.speed.title: Fast
feature.speed.desc: Runs directly in the browser so results appear quickly without waiting on a remote queue.
feature.privacy.title: Local
feature.privacy.desc: Image processing stays on the device instead of being uploaded to a server.
feature.free.title: Open Source
feature.free.desc: A simple public project that can be reviewed, improved, and self-hosted.
footer.desc: A small open-source Gemini image cleanup tool for responsible local use.
status.unsupported: Clipboard copy is not supported in this browser
info.skipped: No Gemini watermark detected; kept original image
original.not_gemini: This image may not match Gemini output rules. A lossless path may be unavailable.
original.pass: The image matches Gemini watermark rules and can use the lossless path.
page.terms.title: Terms of Use - Gemini-Eraser
page.terms.heading: Terms of Use
page.terms.subtitle: Use the tool only for images you are allowed to edit and share.
page.terms.use.title: Use the project responsibly.
page.terms.use.body: You should only process files that you own or have permission to modify.
page.terms.policies.title: Respect platform and copyright rules.
page.terms.policies.body: Removing a visible watermark can have legal or ethical consequences depending on the source and intended use.
page.terms.visible.title: Only visible marks are handled.
page.terms.visible.body: The project focuses on the visible Gemini overlay and does not claim to remove every possible watermark format.
page.terms.privacy.title: Privacy
page.terms.privacy.body: The web app processes images locally in the browser and does not upload them as part of normal use.
page.terms.liability.title: Liability
page.terms.liability.body: The software is provided as-is. You are responsible for how you use the output and for keeping your own files safe.
page.how.title: How It Works - Gemini-Eraser
page.how.heading: How It Works
page.how.subtitle: The app estimates Gemini's visible watermark area and reverses the blend locally instead of sending your image anywhere.
page.how.process.title: 1. Detect the expected watermark area
page.how.process.body: The app uses Gemini sizing and placement rules to find the most likely visible watermark region.
page.how.reverse.title: 2. Reverse the visible blend
page.how.reverse.body: Because the visible overlay pattern is known, the source pixels can be reconstructed mathematically instead of painted over.
page.how.formula.title: Formula
page.how.formula.watermarked: This equation represents the visible watermarked image.
page.how.formula.original: This inverse equation is applied channel by channel to restore the original pixels.
page.how.detection.title: 3. Apply Gemini sizing rules
page.how.detection.body: The remover switches between calibrated watermark templates and margins before any adaptive refinement is attempted.
page.how.offline.title: 4. Keep processing local
page.how.offline.body: Once the page is loaded, the worker, styles, and locale files run locally so the image stays on the device.
page.how.references.title: Optional references
